title: geodorum longifolium
intro: Geodorum longifolium is a species of orchid native to Southeast Asia, commonly known as the "Yellowish-green Geodorum" due to its yellowish-green flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Geodorum longifolium include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
